title: Forgermod
description: This is a mod that adds various metals and weapons, aswell as some ores. In some point in the future, it will have structures aswell.
body:
This mod adds new Materials like Damask, Reinforced Iron, Carbon Steel, Scrap Iron and Steel, but also so-called "supreme Materials", like taifunite, electrium and pulsite. With those Supreme Materials, you can upgrade certain Weapons made from Carbon Steel which have to be assembled in an Assembler (Coming soon). The upgraded Weapons can be infused with gemstones in an Infusion Table.

You can get those Supreme Ingots by collecting Supreme Shards, which can be optained in an Structure called Ancient Grave (Coming soon). Rusty claymores can also be found there, which can be directly upgraded to a Claymore, which can be upgraded to any Claymore variant. These Variants all give the enemy a different effect on hit, but the Supreme Material for your sword wisely, because you can't change the variant afterwards.

Currently, this mod only has Claymore Variants and other swords, but there will be Battleaxes in Update 0.2.0, that's also when the Assembler will be added, and maybe even the Ancient Grave. We are also working on custom Animations for each weapon type including knifes.

This mod is for everyone who is bored of the vanilla weapons, and wants more Ores, Structures (Coming soon) and Weapons.
